prompt: A photorealistic fashion magazine cover featuring a portrait of a beautiful young Asian woman. She has {argument name="hair style" default="light brown hair with blonde highlights and a braided crown"}, soft elegant makeup, and a gentle expression. She is wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="white ribbed off-the-shoulder top with spaghetti straps"} and delicate gold drop earrings. The background is a soft, textured neutral gray. The layout includes elegant typography: a large masthead at the top reading "{argument name="magazine title" default="LUMINA"}" in a classic serif font. On the left side, text reads "THE NEW ERA OF AI BEAUTY" above a larger "{argument name="main headline" default="STYLE EVOLUTION"}". On the right side, text reads "FUTURE FASHION" above "WHAT'S NEXT?". At the bottom, text reads "{argument name="bottom text" default="BEAUTY SECRETS of TOMORROW"}" above "ELEGANT & CHIC". The overall lighting is soft, professional studio illumination.
translatedPrompt: 一张照片级写实的时尚杂志封面，主角是一位美丽的年轻亚裔女性肖像。她留着 {argument name="hair style" default="浅棕色头发，带有金色挑染和编织发冠"}，妆容柔和优雅，表情温婉。她身穿一件 {argument name="clothing" default="白色罗纹露肩吊带上衣"}，佩戴着精致的金色垂坠耳环。背景为质感柔和的中性灰色。版式设计包含优雅的排版：顶部是大号刊头，以经典的衬线字体写着 "{argument name="magazine title" default="LUMINA"}"。左侧文字为 "THE NEW ERA OF AI BEAUTY"，下方是更大的 "{argument name="main headline" default="STYLE EVOLUTION"}"。右侧文字为 "FUTURE FASHION"，下方是 "WHAT'S NEXT?"。底部文字为 "{argument name="bottom text" default="BEAUTY SECRETS of TOMORROW"}"，下方是 "ELEGANT & CHIC"。整体光效为柔和的专业影棚照明。

breakdown.creativeCore: 照片级写实时尚杂志封面：生成一张高度逼真的杂志封面，包含女性肖像，并支持自定义排版和造型。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
